zh.lifeSummary: 當William Champernon於大約1230年出生在英國戴文易爾福拉可姆時，他的父親Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe24歲，母親Dionysia English19歲。他和Joan de Ferrers至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1305年在英國可瓦爾沃德亞斯享年76歲，埋葬在英國戴文易爾福拉可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Champernon于大约1230年出生在英国戴文易爾福拉可姆时，他的父亲Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe24岁，母亲Dionysia English19岁。他和Joan de Ferrers至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1305年在英国可瓦爾沃德亞斯享年76岁，埋葬在英国戴文易爾福拉可姆。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William Champernon was born about 1230, in Ilfracombe, Devon, England, his father, Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe, was 24 and his mother, Dionysia English, was 19. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Joan de Ferrers. He died in 1305, in Tywardreath, Cornwall, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Ilfracombe, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Champernon est né environ 1230, à Ilfracombe, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Dionysia English, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Joan de Ferrers. Il est décédé en 1305, à Tywardreath, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Ilfracombe, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Champernon um 1230 in Ilfracombe, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe 24 und seine Mutter Dionysia English 19. Er hatte mit Joan de Ferrers mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1305 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Tywardreath, Cornwall, England und wurde in Ilfracombe, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Champernon è nato il circa 1230 nel Ilfracombe, Devon, England, il suo padre, Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Dionysia English, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Joan de Ferrers. Morì nel 1305, nel Tywardreath, Cornwall, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Ilfracombe, Devon, England.

ja.Broadclyst, Devon, England: イギリスデボンブロアドクリスト
ja.Ilfracombe, Devon, England: イギリスデボンイルフラコンベ

ja.Tywardreath, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルトイワードレアス
ja.lifeSummary: William Champernonが約1230年にイギリスデボンイルフラコンベで生まれた時，父Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombeは24歳，母Dionysia Englishは19歳であった。彼はJoan de Ferrersとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1305年にイギリスコルンワルトイワードレアスで76歳で死去し，イギリスデボンイルフラコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Champernon(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 데폰 이프라코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Dionysia English(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Joan de Ferrers(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 영국 코른월 타이워드리스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 이프라코브에 묻혔다.

mn.Ilfracombe, Barnstaple, Devon, England: Ilfracombe, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Champernon nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Dionysia English, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Joan de Ferrers. Ele faleceu em 1305, em Tywardreath, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Champernon родился около 1230 г. в местности илфракомб, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Dionysia English, 19. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Joan de Ferrers. Он умер в 1305 г. в местности тивардрит, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности илфракомб, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Champernon nació aproximadamente 1230, en Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Dionysia English, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Joan de Ferrers. Murió en 1305, en Tywardreath, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra.
